name: @openuidev/openclaw-os-plugin
description: OpenClaw plugin that turns agent responses into Generative UI and serves the claw-client at /plugins/openclawos.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --external:openclaw --external:openclaw/* --external:node:* --loader:.json=json --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.bundle-ui: cd ../claw-client && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile=false && pnpm build && rm -rf ../claw-plugin/static && cp -r out ../claw-plugin/static
scripts.ci: pnpm lint:check && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck
